description_long: This object is a classic revolver-style firearm with a long, cylindrical barrel and a dark metallic finish. The frame and barrel are constructed from metal, with a visible cylinder for ammunition and a prominent trigger guard. The grip is made of wood, featuring a curved ergonomic design with a textured pattern for better handling. The barrel is round and elongated, with no visible ribbing or venting, and the overall design is reminiscent of 19th-century percussion revolvers. The trigger guard is rounded and proportionally sized to the grip, providing ample space for finger placement. The object is detailed with realistic surface textures and color variations between the metal and wood components.
description: A long-barreled, dark metallic revolver with a wooden grip and a rounded trigger guard, featuring classic 19th-century styling.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the barrel, the wooden grip, and the cylinder.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the grip behind it.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, cylinder, and the other side of the wooden grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the grip and the top of the frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and round with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no finger grooves
